description: Style NoteCrafted with age old printing and dyeing traditions, each piece from fabindia is created by artisans from villages nestled in the green valleys of India. The brand considers ancient fabric weaving and dyeing techniques that are dying out and infuses them with new life by providing these craftsmen a viable market. This kurta is a unique piece fashioned to please not only those who love the simple life but also the style-consious global citizen. It looks great when styled with leggings.Product DetailsRed printed tunic, has a wrap-around V-neck with a single button placket, has pintucks at the yoke, short sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved and a vented hemMaterial and CareCottonHand wash in cold waterUse mild detergentDry in shadeSizeRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
